user.bio: Graduate student in Computer Science with a strong background in full-stack web development and Computer Engineering. Skilled in modern web frameworks, passionate about building scalable applications, and eager to grow as a full-stack engineer.

workExperience.description: Assisting in teaching and research activities in the Computer Science department.
Developed a boutique store website, a portfolio management system for NEPSE, and an Animal Finder application using modern web technologies.
Led the merger of three departments into a Frontend Department, implemented micro frontends and mono-repo, and improved code quality and coverage.
Managed an 8-member team for the Employee Evaluation System, organized Code Camp, and conducted knowledge-sharing sessions.
Built the Digital Lending System, integrating various services, and led a React team for the Nepal Audit Management System.
Developed the Advertisement Management System, enhanced projects with Kanban boards and WYSIWYG editors, and introduced TypeScript.
Created the Weapon Inventory Management System, improved the Online Police Clearance Report, and developed a data visualization module for NTIP.
Worked on real-world projects under supervision and created project documentation.
Developed and delivered training programs for Node.js and React Js.
